title: hieracium murorum subsp. furfuraceoides
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. furfuraceoides is a plant species in the dandelion family, characterized by its hairy leaves and yellow flowers. It is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it beneficial for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. furfuraceoides include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall well-being. This plant is often prepared as a tincture, salve, or tea, and is used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
